scripts.sync: mkdir -p ~/.Q/build/apps/q-cli/dist && cp -R apps/q-cli/dist/main.mjs ~/.Q/build/apps/q-cli/dist/main.mjs && (cp apps/q-cli/dist/main.mjs.map ~/.Q/build/apps/q-cli/dist/main.mjs.map 2>/dev/null || true) && (cp apps/q-cli/dist/typescript-*.mjs ~/.Q/build/apps/q-cli/dist/ 2>/dev/null || true) && if [ -d packages/agent-core/dist/profiles ]; then mkdir -p ~/.Q/build/apps/q-cli/dist/profiles && cp packages/agent-core/dist/profiles/*.yaml ~/.Q/build/apps/q-cli/dist/profiles/ 2>/dev/null; fi && echo '✓ synced build to ~/.Q/build/'
